description: FactorySorting 7-3FO3ERFKY9RN Siemens scene map regenerated for the six-line top-view layout. There are six production lines; task input objects are placed on the positive-world-y side support tables, and output stations are on the negative-world-y side support tables. Station numbering follows FactorySorting7_3FO3ERFKY9RN line object names: line_1 is input_1/output_1 and line_6 is input_6/output_6. Input and output station entries are kept unchanged; all navigation obstacles are regenerated from the transparent AABB boxes currently defined in factory_sorting_7_3fo3erfky9rn.py.

coordinate_notes.station_centers: input stations use FactorySorting7_3FO3ERFKY9RN._default_siemens_line_object_poses; output stations use FactorySorting7_3FO3ERFKY9RN._siemens_static_table_support_surfaces
coordinate_notes.production_line_sources: narrow wardrobe belt meshes are used as navigation obstacles; large Other/Actor production-line bounding boxes are retained only as non-obstacle references because their total mesh bounds include output-side free space
coordinate_notes.approach_points: input approaches are on the positive-world-x side of each task object to match the robot-facing grasp-site convention; output approaches are on the negative-world-x side of each output table
coordinate_notes.obstacles: input/output station entries are kept unchanged; obstacle entries are regenerated from FactorySorting7_3FO3ERFKY9RN.SCENE_AABB_COLLISION_BOXES excluding station boxes, plus SCENE_AABB_LOOSE_FRAME_BOXES for the six independent floor frames between production lines
